Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones

Class VoteMilestonesManager

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones.VoteMilestonesManager
public class VoteMilestonesManager extends Object
Evaluates VoteMilestones on each vote.

RewardPath is treated as an absolute path from SpecialRewards.yml root.

Supports optional per-milestone limits by persisting a compact id-to-timestamp map in user storage.

    Returns how many votes (in the same counter used by the next milestone) until the next milestone.

      public String getGroupForMilestoneId(String milestoneId)
      Resolve a milestone's configured group id by milestone id (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      group id, or null if milestone not found

      public boolean isMilestoneEnabled(String milestoneId)
      Returns true if a milestone id exists (case-insensitive) and is enabled.

      Detailed status for a group: shows what has already been given (based on limiter storage) and what should have been given given the current total.

    • getNextMilestoneValue

      public Long getNextMilestoneValue(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
      Returns the next VoteMilestone trigger value for the given group (or default), based on enabled milestones in that group.
      Returns:
      next trigger value, or null if none can be determined

    • getLastMilestoneValue

      public Long getLastMilestoneValue(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
      Returns the last (most recent) VoteMilestone trigger value for the given group (or default), based on enabled milestones in that group.
      Returns:
      last trigger value, or null if none can be determined

    • getVotesUntilNextMilestone

      public long getVotesUntilNextMilestone(String groupId, VotingPluginUser user)
      Returns how many votes (in the same counter used by the next milestone) until the next milestone. If no next milestone exists (or can't be determined), returns 0.

    • getLIMITS_STORAGE_KEY

      public static String getLIMITS_STORAGE_KEY()

      public VoteMilestonesConfig getConfig()
